name: Cocrystal Pharma, Inc.
summary: Cocrystal Pharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company discovering and developing novel small molecule antiviral therapeutics for serious and chronic viral diseases caused by RNA viruses. Using proprietary structure-based drug design, X-ray crystallography, and computational chemistry guided by Nobel Prize-winning expertise, the company develops candidates targeting influenza virus, norovirus, coronaviruses (SARS-CoV-2, MERS-CoV), and hepatitis C virus (HCV), with lead programs including CC-42344 for influenza A.

products.name: CC-42344
products.description: Novel oral and inhaled PB2 inhibitor targeting influenza polymerase complex for treatment and prophylaxis of pandemic and seasonal influenza A, including Tamiflu and Xofluza resistant strains.
